reason: The phrase 'project raised concerns at home' is highly relatable and subtly humorous, especially within the crypto community. Many 'projects' (whether it's a new altcoin investment, constant chart-watching, or even building a mining rig) frequently lead to 'concerns' (financial stress, time consumption, spousal disapproval) at 'home'. Its vague yet evocative nature makes it broadly applicable as a meme, capturing a shared, often unspoken, struggle among crypto enthusiasts.
